sections.paragraph:
ἐκβαίνω 2 aor. ἐξέβην (Hom. et al., pap, LXX, EpArist, Philo) go out, come from w. ἀπό (PGen 54, 25 ἀπὸ τ. κώμης; Sir 38:18) Hb 11:15.—M-M.

aor. aor. = aorist

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

EpArist EpArist = Epistle of Aristeas, II b.c.—List 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

PGen PGen = Les Papyrus de Genève—List 4

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 299
